# suicide_8MB.csv — FORK variant: # docs/SPEC.md §3.2. Roomy: keeps BOTH Marauder app slots (ota_0 + ota_1) so Marauder's own
# SD-OTA self-update keeps working (unlike the 4 MB build)

8 MB flash (0x800000): and a full 64 KB coredump. Bootloader @0x1000 (classic ESP32) or @0x0 on

# suicide_8MB.csv — FORK variant: # S3/C3 — set by the build; the partition TABLE offset (0x8000) is unchanged. App offsets are
# 64 KB (0x10000) aligned; data partitions are 4 KB (0x1000) aligned. Sums to exactly 0x800000.
#   0x3D4000 +0x40C000 -> 0x7E0000  spiffs         ~4.0 MB  (shrunk 64 KB to make room for scratch)
# `scratch` (data 0x40) is REQUIRED for SUICIDE_SAFE_MODE: the firmware refuses to simulate a wipe
# (zero erases) if no `scratch` partition exists and NEVER falls back to a live partition
# (docs/SPEC.md §3/§5/§8). Reclaimed by shrinking spiffs 0x10000; still fills 8 MB exactly.
